name: Anthropic
description: AI safety company building Claude. Monitor API access and usage.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to console.anthropic.com and sign in
2. Navigate to Settings > Admin API Keys (requires Organization Admin role)
3. Create a new Admin API key
4. Copy the key and enter it above
5. Note: Admin API keys are required for organization-level checks. Regular API keys only work for model access checks.

checks.name: Anthropic App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Anthropic API is accessible with the provided credentials.

checks.name: Anthropic Employee Access
checks.description: Review Anthropic organization access by listing API keys, pending invitations, and workspaces
